sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, amount DECIMAL, sale_date DATE);
UPDATE sales SET amount = amount * 1.1 WHERE sale_date < '2023-10-03';
SELECT amount, nth_value(amount, 2) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) AS second_sale FROM sales;
SELECT sale_date, amount, nth_value(amount, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY sale_date ORDER BY amount DESC) AS first_amount FROM sales;
